titles.title: Enhancing Mental Health and Suicide Prevention Through Campus Planning Act
Enhancing Mental Health and Suicide Prevention Through Campus Planning Act
A bill to amend the Higher Education Act of 1965 to promote comprehensive campus mental health and suicide prevention plans, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
